discrepancy_analysis: Reported 5-year PFS of MPNST-G2 is ~50%; model reproduced ~46% (KM 0.457) using MOESM10 Fig 1b source data with N=8 MPNST-G2 patients and 3 recurrences. Relative difference = |46 - 50| / 50 = 8%, which is within the ±10% concordance threshold. Values match within expected rounding/estimation tolerance for small-N Kaplan-Meier curves.
